summary: Iteration 56: Navigation and Landing page redesign tested. All features working correctly. Desktop nav has 6 category mega-menu dropdowns (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore) + Sage direct link + Profile dropdown. Landing page has 6 category pillar cards replacing 24 feature cards. Mobile nav uses accordion sections. All tests passed.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key Hold4' - minor issue in Breathing page, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React key warning for 'Hold4' in Breathing page - should use unique keys for list items

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all navigation and landing page features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 complete. Navigation redesign verified: (1) Desktop nav has 6 category dropdowns (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore) that open on hover with mega-menu showing items in 2-column grid for categories with >6 items. (2) Sage direct link navigates to /coach. (3) Language selector, ambient toggle, Sign In button all functional. (4) Profile dropdown shows when logged in with Dashboard, Profile, Avatar, Wellness Reports, Certifications, Med. History, My Media, Tutorial, Sign Out. (5) Active category highlighting works (Practice highlighted when on /breathing). (6) Mobile nav has hamburger menu opening fullscreen overlay with Sage CTA at top and 6 category accordions that expand to show items in 2-column grid. (7) Landing page has hero section with Quick Reset, Begin Journey, Sign In buttons. (8) Landing page has 6 category pillar cards (Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish & Heal, Explore, Sage AI Coach) with color-coded highlight tags. (9) Testimonials section renders 6 testimonials. (10) Pillar cards navigate to correct paths on click. (11) Navigation hides on /, /auth, and /vr pages.
